AboutFriendsMotW

I've almost forgot how boring college life could be, and now I've found it back again.

Mar 3, 2026 • the42game

Yet another boring day at school

So sure, it has been three days since this term had started, and yet I’ve got nothing to do, like at all.
I got classes from 8am to 5.30pm today, and I am writing this during the last class of the day and it’s boring as hell this class btw.
And I’ve also got those kinda class that blame on victims as if they are the one that started all this crap. And I just wireguard-ed back to home and play with my Proxmox VE and ignore all the propagandas, and I still ignored her even when she knocked on the desk I was sitting on for me using laptops during class lmfao.
Oh and ughh the whole shit about classmate relationship

Updates from the future: It got fix somehow.
